creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: jgh
Date: Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013
New Revision: 309948
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309948

Log:
  - add new port: databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn
  
  DBIx::Class::PassphraseColumn - Automatically hash password/passphrase columns
  
  WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/
  
  PR:		174736
  Submitted by:	fw@moov.de

Added:
  head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/
  head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/databases/Makefile

Modified: head/databases/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/Makefile	Sat Jan  5 03:00:14 2013	(r309947)
+++ head/databases/Makefile	Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013	(r309948)
@@ -360,6 +360,7 @@
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-Loader
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-Migration
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-MooseColumns
+    SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-QueryLog
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-QueryProfiler
     SUBDIR += p5-DBIx-Class-ResultSet-HashRef

Added: head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/Makefile	Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013	(r309948)
@@ -0,0 +1,21 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn
+PORTVERSION=	0.02
+CATEGORIES=	databases perl5
+MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
+MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	DBIx
+PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+
+MAINTAINER=	fw@moov.de
+COMMENT=	Automatically hash password/passphrase columns
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-DBIx-Class-DynamicDefault>=0.03:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-DynamicDefault \
+		p5-DBIx-Class>=0.08009:${PORTSDIR}/databases/p5-DBIx-Class
+BUILD_DEPENDS:=	${RUN_DEPENDS}
+
+PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
+
+MAN3=	DBIx::Class::PassphraseColumn.3
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/distinfo	Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013	(r309948)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn-0.02.tar.gz) = a99e72dc438ca236f6299712bad86d938f623502276d49fedbb7449b5538d003
+SIZE (DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn-0.02.tar.gz) = 13395

Added: head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-descr	Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013	(r309948)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+DBIx::Class::PassphraseColumn - Automatically hash password/passphrase columns
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/

Added: head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/databases/p5-DBIx-Class-PassphraseColumn/pkg-plist	Sat Jan  5 06:00:37 2013	(r309948)
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+%%SITE_PERL%%/DBIx/Class/PassphraseColumn.pm
+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx/Class/PassphraseColumn/.packlist
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx/Class/PassphraseColumn
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx/Class
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/DBIx
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/DBIx/Class
+@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/DBIx
